content.en:
"These thirty Peer Source Stones can allow my thirty immeasurable bones to complete six bone transformations, and if there are enough Beyond Source Stones, I can even quickly break through to the Six Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He continued to use the Beyond Source Stone to refine his immeasurable bones.

One primeval epoch after another passed.

Finally, all the thirty Peer Source Stones were used, and he had successfully refined all the thirty Infinite Bones to six bone transformations.

However, if you want to complete the six bone transformations of the immeasurable bones in your body, you need more source stones from the other side.

But at this time, his contribution value is not enough.

Although he is a genius at the other side, Gu Hengshan is also a ruler.

Moreover, he has been given a lot of resources and the position of the lord, as well as some contribution points, and he still wants to get the source stone of the other side for free, which is impossible.

If the other side level genius can get the other side source stone for free, then the first other side level genius of Gu Heng Mountain, the Lord of Gu Void, can directly take all the source stones of Gu Heng Mountain, and it will not be left to him!

In order to be able to get more contribution points.

Ye Tian came to make a commotion, that is, he engraved the black text on the other side of Gu Heng Mountain and the gold inscription on the other side and handed it to Gu Heng Mountain.

In this way, Gu Hengshan will give him a lot of contribution points.

Sure enough.

In doing so, he gained a large amount of contribution value at once.

As everyone knows, some of the Golden Scripts on the Other Side and the Black Text on the Other Shore are from the True Beast Alliance, but the True Beast Alliance doesn't know either, so he feels that there is no problem.

Once he had enough contribution points, he began to exchange a large number of Source Stones from the other side.

As one source stone after another was consumed, Ye Tian's immeasurable bones one after another also completed six bone transformations.

Hundreds of primeval years later.

Ye Tian successfully completed six bone transformations on the three hundred and sixty-four immeasurable bones in his body, leaving only the last immeasurable bone and the last point that did not complete six bone transformations.

In other words, he reached the extreme of five bone transformations.

"The bottleneck of a primary-level genius on the other side is even more difficult to break than the bottleneck of an primeval-level genius!"

Ye Tian also tried many times, but he could barely shake it.

Thereupon.

He was ready to ask someone for advice.

"It's a little inappropriate to ask Jun Zu, my Eternal Giant Ape Horse Armor has not yet become a genius at the other side, and the cultivation path is different from that of a cultivator, so the experience is naturally different. "

So, he was ready to consult the Lord of Eternal Zero.

Moreover, he is a genius at the other side, and he is also a lord, so he naturally has the qualifications to consult the Lord of Eternal Zero.

Unless the Lord of Eternal Zero enters into a long retreat, there is no Lord in sight.

But now, the Lord of Eternal Zero did not say so, so he could still consult the Lord of Eternal Zero.

......

"I've seen the Lord of Eternal Zero!"

Ye Tian came to visit.

"Lord of Endless, what's the matter?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero asked.

"Lord of Eternal Zero, I have fallen into a bottleneck, and I want to ask for advice on how I can break the shackles. "

Ye Tian expressed his doubts.

"So that's it!" the Lord of Eternal Zero smiled, "The other side-level genius can use the other side source stone to quickly refine the immeasurable bone, but the bottleneck still exists, and it is more difficult to break than the bottleneck of the primeval-level genius. It is difficult to break through the bottleneck by your own efforts. However, it is not without other shortcuts. "

"Please also ask the Lord of Eternal Zero for advice!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

The Lord of Eternal Zero did not hide it, and said directly: "That is the technique of creating the supernatural power on the other side, every time the supernatural power of the other side is created, it will increase the power of the origin of the other side in the body, so as to refine the physical body." This is the wedge, when the time comes, take the opportunity to use the source stones on the other side, prepare more source stones on the other side, and then break through the shackles in one go, then it's okay! So, for the geniuses on the other side, when the bottleneck comes, create a magic technique on the other side, this is the most important thing, and nothing else matters. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

At this time.

He remembered the Lord of the True Extreme, the other party had not studied the golden incarnation on the other side, was he stuck in a bottleneck, and was creating a top-notch supernatural power technique on the other side, so as to try to break the shackles and be promoted to the ninth bone transformation realm!

This is a high probability!

Having obtained a breakthrough from the Lord of Eternal Zero, he was ready to go back and give it a try.

The Lord of Eternal Zero was not worried about whether Ye Tian would create something that would lead to heavy damage or even a fall if the failure of the Divine Power Technique on the other side would lead to heavy damage or even a fall.

He thought that since Ye Tian had succeeded once, he must have his own way to save his life, so he didn't need to care.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian announced a long-term retreat when he left, and in fact, other copies of the body to carry out the research and creation of the supernatural power technique on the other side.

Now.

The number of golden texts on the other side that he has mastered is far greater than in the past, and the number of black texts on the other side is also increasing.

As a result, he was able to create a better Beyond Divine Technique.

It's just that it takes a long time.

In the years that followed.

Ye Tian tried to create the magic power of the other side again and again, and every time he failed, he would bring heavy damage to his body.

However, he now knows a lot about the magic of the other side, so he will gain a lot of experience every time he fails, which makes him realize more and more.

One Hundred Archievous!

Five hundred primeval eras!

A thousand primeval eras!

Before you know it, more than 1,300 primeval eras have passed.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian successfully created a good supernatural technique on the other side.

This Otherside Divine Power Technique is a defensive type of Otherside Divine Skill, and once it is used, it will be very difficult to hurt him.

He named this magic technique on the other side as the Golden Cover on the other side!

After the creation of the Golden Cover of the Other Shore, he integrated this Divine Power Technique of the Other Shore into the power of the Origin of the Other Shore, so that the Origin of the Other Shore was in a rapid state and quickly tempered his whole body.

Followed by.

He took out pieces of source stones from the other side, and took the opportunity to impact the six bone transformation realms.

Rumble!!!!!

Pieces of source stones on the other side were quickly consumed, and the speed of refining was incomparably fast.

And his last bottleneck was worn off little by little.

At last.

Airplanes!!!!!

The last immeasurable bone was tempered to six bone transformations, successfully breaking the shackles and bottlenecks.

Immediately afterward, his whole body began to metamorphose, and he was promoted to the sixth bone transformation realm.

Endless energy poured into his body, helping him to achieve his promotion.

After a long time.

Ye Tian successfully broke through to the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm.

"I finally broke through to the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm, and I am still a genius at the other side of the Sixth Bone Transformation Realm, even if it is an ordinary Nine Bone Transformation Realm, I am not my opponent now!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

This kind of strength, placed in the Eternal Ancient Demon City, is the top existence.
